faqs.question: What types of spiders are commonly found in Lynbrook homes?
faqs.answer: Lynbrook residents most frequently encounter house spiders, cellar spiders, wolf spiders, and occasionally yellow sac spiders. While most species found on Long Island are harmless, they can be unsettling and create webs throughout your home. Our spider control service targets all common species and includes identification to ensure proper treatment methods.
